args.help: Predicted cell-type annotations TSV (cell_id, predicted_labels, CL_pred)
TSV of ground-truth cell-type labels (cell_id, truths, CL_label)

General Cell Ontology (CL) DAG in OBO format, pinned to a fixed release (id: CL term IDs, is_a relations) — used for resolution-aware annotation accuracy (exact/parent/child/sibling match, no-match rate) against annotations_tsv's CL_pred / rawdata_clusters_truth's CL_label columns
